ict_quality_filters._comment: PROFESSIONAL ICT - Context over metrics (2025-11-18 - Full Professional Implementation)
ict_quality_filters._rationale: Professional ICT requires sweep OR MSS (context), 2.0x volume (institutional), at structure levels. Old 1.1x volume produced 0 trades.

order_block._size_comment: Size less important with sweep/MSS validation
order_block._volume_comment: PROFESSIONAL: 2.0x = institutional standard (hardcoded in detection, not configurable anymore)
order_block._swing_comment: At swing structure (15% tolerance for NSE volatility)

fair_value_gap._fvg_volume_comment: RELAXED (Dec 2024): 1.5->1.2 - only 1 detection in 6 months with 1.5x
fair_value_gap._penetration_comment: RELAXED: Allow wick penetration (30% max, was 25%)
fair_value_gap._vwap_comment: RELAXED (Dec 2024): 0.15->0.25 - allow FVG further from VWAP
fair_value_gap._swing_comment: RELAXED (Dec 2024): 0.15->0.25 - allow FVG further from swing

liquidity_gates._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 1: Liquidity Filters (evidence-based thresholds). NOTE: Was silently broken until 2026-02-03 (symbol format bug). Disable until thresholds are re-evaluated against baseline.
liquidity_gates._rationale_micro_caps: ENABLED per 3-month baseline analysis: micro-caps generated 84% of profits (Rs.5,550 out of Rs.6,617). failure_fade strategy excels in volatile, illiquid names.

large_cap._rationale: Liquid names - lower volume requirements due to deep order books

mid_cap._rationale: Need 2x volume confirmation vs large-cap to avoid manipulation

small_cap._rationale: Strict filters - 3x volume surge required to avoid false breakouts (institutional standard)

micro_cap._rationale: STRICTEST filters - 4x volume surge (vs 3x small-caps) to ensure tradeable liquidity. Baseline data: 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF, Rs.173/trade avg.

cap_strategy_preferences._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 2: Strategy-Cap Mapping (institutional evidence)

large_cap._rationale: Large-caps mean-revert reliably (70% WR), move slowly on momentum. Institutional HFT keeps prices efficient.

mid_cap._rationale: Mid-caps: best balance of momentum + structure. All strategies viable.

small_cap._rationale: Small-caps momentum-driven (2-3x faster moves). Mean-reversion unreliable due to low liquidity + manipulation risk.

micro_cap._rationale: BASELINE PROVEN: 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF, Rs.173/trade (best segment!). failure_fade strategy DOMINATES micro-caps due to high volatility + retail-driven failed breakouts. Avoid range/pullback strategies (too choppy).

cap_risk_adjustments._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 3: Risk Sizing by Cap (Van Tharp evidence)

large_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.5x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

mid_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.5x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

small_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.7x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

micro_cap._rationale: REVERTED from 2.0x to 1.8x - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses

regime_cap_allocation._comment: Market Cap Segmentation - Priority 4: Regime-Cap Interaction (institutional rotation + baseline data)

chop._rationale: CHOP â†’ Large-caps + micro-caps excel (mean-reversion edge). Micro-caps 25% weight due to BASELINE: 43.8% WR, 1.63 PF with failure_fade strategy in chop conditions.

trend_up._rationale: TREND_UP â†’ Mid/Small-caps lead momentum. Micro-caps 15% (moderate allocation, prefer liquidity in trends).

trend_down._rationale: TREND_DOWN â†’ Flight to quality, minimize micro-cap exposure. Micro-caps 10% (lowest allocation due to crash risk).

squeeze._rationale: SQUEEZE â†’ Balanced allocation awaiting breakout direction. Micro-caps 15% (moderate, can explode either way).

regime_cap_allocation._institutional_evidence: Linda Raschke: market cap rotation patterns follow regime shifts. CTAs rotate from largeâ†’midâ†’small during trend, reverse during chop.
regime_cap_allocation._baseline_evidence: 3-month baseline: micro-caps generated 84% of profits (Rs.5,550 / Rs.6,617 total). failure_fade strategy dominates micro-caps in CHOP conditions.

_comment_entry_zone: STRATEGY-SPECIFIC ENTRY ZONES: Breakout fix applied - wider zones for momentum continuation
_comment_breakout_mult: Breakout strategies: 0.25 ATR (3x wider for momentum). NOTE: Immediate execution enabled, zone used for fallback only.
_comment_fade_mult: Failure fade strategies: 0.08 ATR (proven optimal with 35% trigger rate)
_comment_default_mult: Other strategies: 0.15 ATR (reverted from 0.25 - wider zones caused T1+ rate drop from 26% to 21% and avg T1+ PnL crash from Rs.684 to Rs.136)
_comment_breakout_execution: PHASE 1 FIX: Breakout immediate execution (professional standard)
_comment_immediate: True = Execute immediately on decision (no entry zone wait). Fixes 8-minute delay issue.
_comment_volume_surge: PHASE 4 REVERT: Back to 1.5x (TypeError fix resolved the 3.2% trigger issue, not filter strictness). Professional standard for volume confirmation.
_comment_momentum_candle: PHASE 4 REVERT: Back to 2.0x - stricter filter for candle size ensures quality breakouts. TypeError was the real blocker, not this threshold.
_comment_volume_short: PHASE 4 REVERT: Back to 2.0x for shorts - short breakouts need stronger volume confirmation (institutional standard).
_comment_momentum_short: PHASE 4 REVERT: Back to 2.5x for shorts - short breakouts require larger candles to avoid false breakdowns.

fill_quality._comment: Reject fills that compress R:R below 0.3 or slip > 0.75%. T1 is partial (50% qty), so 0.3R still covers costs. 0.75% allows normal mid-cap slippage while catching liquidity gaps.

gap_fade_short._live_status: PRIMARY — Phase 7 OOS PASS: PF=1.36, WR=70%, N=797 in 117-session Holdout. Restricted to small_cap (the validated cell). Mid/micro_cap not Phase-7 validated.
gap_fade_short._audit_decision_2026_05_01: TRUSTED -- validated production setup. NET PF=1.49 on 5,848 trades over 2-yr Discovery (sub-project #5 era). Indian-microstructure-specific: small-cap retail-driven gap-up exhaustion + structural opening-window mechanics + SHORT-only (aligned with SEBI FY23 long-bias-loses finding). Locked, no design changes.

orb_15._rev2_notes: stop_at_range_midpoint=false is opposite-end-of-range (Indian-source default). range_window_start=09:20 skips pre-open call-auction wick. max_gap_pct_for_orb=0.5: skip ORB if today's open gap > 0.5% (route to gap_fade_short). entry_zone directional 0.3% — breakout continuation; smoke-22 showed ±0.1% symmetric starved fills to 11%.
orb_15._redesign_notes: Redesign 2026-04-29 per specs/2026-04-29-orb_15-redesign-plan.md. Sources: specs/2026-04-28-research-orb_15-findings.md (47,754-trade gross_PF 1.052 / net_PF 0.797 baseline; re-fire spam 87% post-10:25; SELL×squeeze×09:50 cell gross_PF 1.624 / net_PF 1.298 / n=206 OOS-stable) and specs/2026-04-28-research-orb_15-indian-pro-mechanics.md (sweep+reclaim per Sahi/DailyPriceAction; NR7 per Crabel/HDFC Sky/eLearnMarkets; rvol per QuantConnect 2.4-Sharpe). New params: sweep_reclaim_lookback_bars=6 (30min cap to 10:00); nr7_lookback_days=7 / nr7_multiplier=1.0 (today's OR ≤ min(prior 7 OR ranges)); min_rvol_at_or_close=2.0 / rvol_baseline_lookback_days=14; exclude_dow=[4] (Friday gross_PF 0.925 vs >1.05 other DOWs); allowed_regimes/allowed_sides empty allowlist = none allowed (explicit semantics). First-trigger latch in detect() prevents re-fire spam.
orb_15._live_status: disabled — redesign awaiting Phase 3 backtest validation
orb_15._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- failed Phase-1 validation. Per sub-project #9 spec section 5 + lessons.md 2026-05-01. NET PF=0.79 on 8,448 Discovery-only trades; no Stage-3-passing cell; cargo-culted Opening Range Breakout pattern (Toby Crabel, US-origin). Universal pattern, not Indian-microstructure-specific. See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

pdh_pdl_reject._rev2_notes: volume_polarity is A/B variant: 'absence' (default â€” bar vol must NOT be >= 1.5x recent) or 'spike' (bar vol must be >= 1.5x recent). Reviewer flagged Indian sources contested on polarity; Phase 1 runs both.
pdh_pdl_reject._live_status: disabled — research only, not Phase 7 validated
pdh_pdl_reject._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- failed Phase-1 validation. NET PF=0.65 on 3,220 Discovery-only trades; no Stage-3-passing cell on disciplined Discovery. The mid_cap PF=1.46 cell from undisciplined runs was tainted by validation-data leakage. Universal level-rejection pattern, not Indian-specific. See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim._research_notes: Indian-pro sweep+reclaim mechanic per specs/2026-04-28-research-pdh_pdl_reject-indian-pro-mechanics.md. M1 (sweep+reclaim core trigger) — Sahi.com / DailyPriceAction liquidity-sweep literature: bar t-1 PENETRATES the level (high > pdh*(1+pen) for shorts) AND closes back inside (close < pdh*(1-rec)); bar t confirms via close < pdh AND close < bar(t-1).low. M2 (multi-day confluence) — Phase 1 OFF, enable in Phase 2 if base mechanic underperforms. M8 (gap-context side selector) — on gap-up days prefer PDH-fade-short, gap-down prefer PDL-fade-long, flat-open allow both. Active window 11:00-14:00 confirmed in IPM§4 mid_cap PF table (morning re-test of yesterday's extremes). fno_liquid_200 starting universe — research found edge concentrated in mid_cap with OLD trigger; new mechanic may have different cap-segment behavior, so cast wide net for Edge Discovery.
pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim._live_status: disabled — Phase 0 scaffolding only, awaits Edge Discovery → Phase 1 backtest
pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- failed Phase-1 validation. NET PF=0.94 on only 93 Discovery-only trades (below n=500 floor). ICT-style sweep+reclaim pattern; cargo-culted from US/forex SMC literature. See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

gap_and_go_continuation._research_notes: Indian-pro gap-and-go continuation per specs/2026-04-29-research-new-indian-setup-candidates.md Candidate 5. Sources: Enrich Money, ICICI Direct, TrueData, GWC India, Motilal Oswal. REGIME-COMPLEMENT to live gap_fade_short — large-cap CONTINUES, small-cap FADES. Mutual exclusion with orb_15 enforced by gap_threshold_pct=1.0 vs max_gap_pct_for_orb=0.5 (the 0.5-1.0% band is intentionally dead). allowed_cap_segments=large_cap+mid_cap (opposite of gap_fade_short small_cap). Mechanic: bar 0 (09:15) qualifies on gap_pct + daily-trend (PDC vs 20SMA) + first-bar new-extreme + rising volume; bar 1+ tags bar 0 high/low to fire entry.
gap_and_go_continuation._live_status: disabled — Phase 0 scaffolding only, awaits Phase 3 backtest
gap_and_go_continuation._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- failed Phase-1 validation, fundamentally structural mismatch. NET PF=0.55 on 2,136 Discovery-only trades. Long-bias gap-continuation is exactly the LOSING flow per SEBI FY23 (70% of cash intraday traders lose, 93% of F&O). Cargo-culted. See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

ema5_alert_pullback._research_notes: Subasish Pani / Power of Stocks 5 EMA Alert-Candle Pullback. Per canonical research (AlgoTest, Myalgomate, TradeWithTech, StockPathshala, EzQuant): the strategy is a ROLLING-ALERT-CANDLE mechanic with NO numeric trend-bar prerequisite — alerts can form ANY TIME after open, and the 10:00 AM gate is the ENTRY (fill) cutoff, not a setup-window cutoff. Initial production config (active_window 09:30-10:00, trend_lookback_bars=10) was over-constrained: trend_lookback_bars=10 + active_window=09:30-10:00 made the trend prerequisite mathematically unsatisfiable inside the window (need 11 prior bars; max 9 exist by 10:00 AM), so the detector could literally never fire. Phase-C calibration (2026-04-30): widened active_window to 09:15-10:00 (entry-cutoff semantics) and reduced trend_lookback_bars to 3 (minimal recent-uptrend confirmation; canonical has 0 — rolling alert). min_bars_required = trend_lookback_bars + alert + confirm = 5. Mechanic: in established 5m uptrend (ema_slope_positive over 3 increments), the FIRST candle whose entire body+wick HIGH closes BELOW 5 EMA = Alert Candle; the next bar whose HIGH breaks the alert candle's HIGH fires LONG. Mirror SHORT. Subasish-published 1:3 RR target (t2_rr=3.0); T1 50% partial at 1.5R per project tiered-exit framework.
ema5_alert_pullback._live_status: disabled — Phase 0 scaffolding only, awaits Phase 3 backtest
ema5_alert_pullback._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- insufficient sample for Phase-1 validation (n=4 within intended fno_liquid_200 universe on Discovery period). Subasish Pani 5-EMA pattern; published Indian source but generic trend-pullback mechanic, not Indian-microstructure-specific. See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

camarilla_l3_reversal._research_notes: Camarilla L3/H3 mean-revert per specs/2026-04-29-research-new-indian-setup-candidates.md Candidate 1. Indian sources: market-pulse.in, Pivottrading.co.in, Bhaskar Das Medium, Jainam, Fisdom, OptionX. CANONICAL Camarilla formulas (NOT Floor Pivot): Range=PDH-PDL; P=(PDH+PDL+PDC)/3; H3=PDC+0.275*Range; L3=PDC-0.275*Range; H4/L4=PDC±0.55*Range. Stop AT L4/H4 (no extra ATR buffer — L4/H4 is the wide stop per Camarilla literature). Active window 10:00-14:00 (skip first 30 min for level visibility, skip last 90 min closing volatility). max_adx_for_revert=25 — Camarilla literature explicit on trending days running through L3 to L4. Mutual-exclusion vs pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim when L3 within 0.3% of PDL (or H3 within 0.3% of PDH) — cede to that detector to avoid double-trade. Bidirectional via single setup name: long side fires off L3, short side fires off H3.
camarilla_l3_reversal._live_status: disabled — Phase 0 scaffolding; awaits Phase 1 backtest validation
camarilla_l3_reversal._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DISABLED -- failed Phase-1 validation. NET PF=0.97 on 224 Discovery-only trades; no Stage-3-passing cell. Camarilla pivots are universal (not Indian-specific). See specs/2026-05-01-sub-project-9-microstructure-first-redesign.md.

expiry_pin_strike_reversal._research_notes: Calendar+OI driven pin-magnet reversal per specs/2026-04-29-research-new-indian-setup-candidates.md §Candidate 8. Sources: Wright Research, ICFM, OptionX, PL Capital. Mechanic: market-makers minimize gamma exposure by pulling spot to high-OI strike on Indian weekly+monthly expiry sessions post 13:30 IST. Detector fires only on expiry days (is_expiry_day true), only on NIFTY heavyweights (top 10 by weight — pin gravity is mediated through index basket constituents, not random F&O symbols), only when spot is ≥0.3% from pin (room for the magnet pull), and only after RSI extreme reading earlier in session (overbought → short towards pin from above; oversold → long towards pin from below). Stop = 0.5*ATR beyond entry. Tiered T1 50% qty at half-distance to pin; T2 100% qty at pin strike. First-trigger latch keyed on (symbol, side, session_date_iso). Monthly expiry uses last-Thursday-of-month rule via is_monthly_expiry; weekly is any other expiry day.
expiry_pin_strike_reversal._live_status: disabled — Phase 0 scaffolding; awaits Phase B3 backtest validation
expiry_pin_strike_reversal._audit_decision_2026_05_01: DEFERRED -- NOT disabled. Indian-specific F&O gamma-pin asymmetry; design is sound (NIFTY heavyweights + RSI decay + spot-vs-pin distance). Validation impossible on the 20260430-232414 OCI run because option_chain parquets failed to download (entrypoint list_objects bug; fixed in commit d50b28f). Re-run on next OCI capture (with OI download fix) for Phase-1 validation evidence.

time_policy._comment_start_trade: OPENING BELL FIX: Changed from 10:15 to 09:15 - allow entries from market open (premium_zone T1 hits at 09:15-09:30)

_comment_sl_atr_mult: REVERTED from 2.0 to 1.6 - wider stops were causing 800+ Rs losses instead of 600-700 Rs max
_comment_exit_sl_atr_mult_min: ATR SL adjustment disabled (0 = off). When >0, widens SL to at least N*ATR from entry. Was hardcoded to 1.0.
_comment_time_sl_rationale: Research: Morning volatility (10-11 AM) causes 35% hard_sl rate. Pro traders widen stops after time-in-trade to avoid whipsaw. Based on LuxAlgo/TrendSpider ATR strategies.
_comment_sl_time_minutes: Minutes after entry before SL widening kicks in (professional standard: 30-60 min)
_comment_sl_atr_add: Additional ATR to add to SL after time threshold (0.3 ATR = ~15% wider stop)
_comment_sl_max_r: Only widen if trade is within this R from entry (prevents widening on clear losers)
_comment_sl_second_minutes: Second widening threshold for longer trades
_comment_sl_second_atr: Additional ATR to add at second threshold (cumulative: 0.3 + 0.2 = 0.5 ATR total)
_comment_trail: REVERT: Trail disabled (T3=0) - trail was losing money in exit-opt-003. Full exit at T2.
_comment_t1: Reverted to 60-40. 80-20 lost Rs.28K in 3yr backtest cross-reference (hurt range_bounce/resistance_bounce).
_comment_t2: 60-40 split allows T2 runners to capture more profit on winning trades.
_comment_be_buffer: Buffer above/below breakeven for SL after T1 (0.1% = 10 bps)
_comment_trail_time: PHASE 3: Tighten trail after 2:30 PM when NSE liquidity drops
_comment_t1_min_r: Skip T1 partial if profit < 0.3R â€” charges eat 87%+ of gross at <0.3R on NSE
_comment_or_kill: OR kill exit: DISABLED â€” not in working run. Keys kept for code compatibility.
_comment_last_scan: Last scan slot to fire. Scans after this time are skipped to guarantee exit path (scale-out + EOD squareoff) has clean bandwidth. Must be >= entry_cutoff_hhmm and <= eod_squareoff_hhmm.
_comment_eod: PHASE 3: Extended from 15:12 to 15:15 to capture 3 extra minutes (safe before 15:20 circuit breaker)
_comment_max_positions: DIAGNOSTIC: Disabled limit (999) to see true setup performance without portfolio competition
_comment_wide_open: MASTER FLAG: when true, all historical-PnL filters are bypassed so raw detector edge can be measured on a 3-year backtest. Disables: trade_quality_gates (hour 10 block + category floors), _check_validated_combinations (VC whitelist), ICT sweep/MSS prerequisite in order_block detector, _validate_htf_trend hard-coded calls in BOS/CHoCH/FVG, _validate_premium_discount_zone calls, event_policy_gate session/expiry policy, news_spike_gate size penalties, directional_bias multipliers (neutralized to 1.0), dedupe cooloff, blocked_regimes/caps/entirely in all pipeline configs. PRESERVED: risk math, exit logic (T1/T2/SL/trailing/EOD), MIS eligibility, timing infrastructure, detector firing conditions themselves. Set to false for normal production operation.

quality_filters._comment_momentum_quality: INSTITUTIONAL FIX (exit-opt-004-phase2c): Momentum-based quality metric for breakouts. Replaces distance-based structural R:R with volume*breakout_strength/risk. Root cause analysis revealed distance-based R:R is inversely correlated with breakout quality - strong breakouts enter above ORH and had LOW structural R:R. Momentum quality measures what actually matters: volume confirmation + breakout strength + risk efficiency.

time_windows._comment_morning_start: OPENING BELL FIX: Changed from 09:25 to 09:15 - allow entries from market open to catch fresh moves (premium_zone T1 hits at 09:15-09:30)

opening_bell_override._comment: OPENING BELL DETECTION - Professional NSE Strategy (Fix for premium_zone_short late entries)
opening_bell_override._rationale: Evidence: 82% of premium_zone_short trades had T1 hit at 09:15-09:30, but entries at 11:00-14:00 (2-3 hrs late). Scanner now runs early (09:20-09:30) ONLY for ICT setups to catch first 2 candles. Other setups still wait until 09:30+ (normal 3-bar requirement).
opening_bell_override._window_comment: 10-minute opening window (09:20-09:30) for ICT setups ONLY - scanner runs with 1 bar minimum to catch first candle (09:15-09:20) like pro traders. Bypasses momentum/range filters, requires 2.0x volume. Other setups blocked until 09:30.
opening_bell_override._momentum_bypass_rationale: Opening session has high momentum (gap moves) - this is DESIRED, not noise. Momentum filter blocks best entries.
opening_bell_override._range_compression_bypass_rationale: Opening session has high ATR (expansion from gap) - this is NORMAL. Range compression filter blocks opening moves.
opening_bell_override._volume_comment: 2.0x volume = institutional participation (same as ICT standard). Ensures quality opening moves, not retail noise.
opening_bell_override._allowed_setups_comment: Surviving sub7+sub8 setups after Phase 1 cleanup. gap_fade_short fires at 09:30 (only one active in 09:15-09:30 window today). orb_15, pdh_pdl_reject, and pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim listed for forward-compat — their detectors gate themselves on min_bars_required and active_window.

quality_filters._comment_vwap_threshold: TIGHTENED: 1.5% from VWAP (was 2.0%) - only early-stage moves, not chasing tops
quality_filters._comment_volume_threshold: TIGHTENED: 2.0x volume (was 1.5x) - require stronger institutional participation

_enhanced_strategy_mappings._comment: These map your planner strategies to trigger types

exits._comment_orb_failed_breakout: Buffer as fraction of OR range before triggering failed breakout exit. 0.3 = close must be 30% of OR range above ORL (for shorts) to trigger exit. Prevents normal pullback retests from killing trades.

risk._comment: mode=percentage uses capital*percentage, mode=fixed uses fixed_amount in Rs.

capital_management._comment_sizing: min_notional=4% min position, capital_util=85% safety buffer, max_alloc=20% max per trade

mis_leverage._comment: MIS leverage data is read from nse_all.json (mis_leverage field). This just enables/disables the feature.

planner_precision._comment: Option B: Increase measured move caps to 2x and 3x to allow configured 1.5R and 3.0R targets while maintaining structure-based safety

market_data_bus._comment_mode: standalone=local only (default), subscriber=receive from Market Data Service. Use --shared-market-data flag to enable subscriber mode.
market_data_bus._comment_ltp_mode: standalone=local cache, subscriber=read from Redis. Follows 'mode' setting.

daily_cache_redis._comment: Share daily OHLCV cache via Redis. MDS pre-warms (rolling cache from yesterday) and stores; subscribers load from Redis (~1-3s vs ~17min API). Set enabled:true when using multi-instance with Redis.

market_data_bus._comment_mds_eod: MDS builds daily bars from 1m data (9:15-15:30) and shuts down at this time (IST). 2 min buffer after market close to finalize last bar.
market_data_bus._comment_orb_trigger: 5m bar start-timestamp that triggers ORB level computation. Bar 0935 covers [09:35-09:40) and fires at ~09:40 wall time, after opening range (0915-0930) is complete.

_comment_execution_mode: in_process=all-in-one (default), separated=auto-spawn exec child process (shared logs), scan_only/exec_only=manual two-terminal. Backtest always forces in_process.
_comment_trade_plan_queue: Redis list key for trade plan handoff between scan and exec processes

tick_recording._comment: Records ticks to data/sidecar/ticks/ for backtesting. Can also run standalone: python -m market_data.tick_recorder

directional_bias._comment: V4: Data-optimized. 3yr grid search shows against-trend trades are net profitable (avg +Rs.197). Edge is in BOOSTING with-trend 1.2x, NOT blocking against. Exit modifiers neutralized (T1 split and trail changes tested negative). entry_threshold 0.2% for earlier direction detection.

_comment_backtest_mis: === BACKTEST MIS FILTERING (Reject non-MIS stocks in backtest to match live) ===

backtest_mis_filtering._comment: Filter non-MIS stocks in backtest using nse_all.json mis_enabled field. Large/mid cap MIS is 98.9% stable over 3 years. No capital restrictions applied â€” backtest tests signals/filters, not capital management.

_comment_early_mis_filter: === EARLY MIS UNIVERSE FILTER (Reduce live/paper universe to MIS-eligible stocks) ===

api_5m_bars._note: Fetch V3 intraday 5m bars for ALL core_symbols BEFORE Stage-0. Uses Historical API pipeline â€” guarantees backtest-live parity for both energy scoring and structure detection. Only active in live/paper mode (not backtest). 1500 symbols at 40 RPS = ~37s. Set fetch_all_symbols=false to revert to old behavior (fetch shortlisted only, after Stage-0).

bar_density_gate._note: Filters illiquid symbols where WebSocket doesnt deliver all 1m candles. Density = closed_1m_bars / elapsed_minutes. Symbols below min_density_pct are excluded from screening. min_bars_before_check prevents false positives in early session.

early_mis_universe_filter._comment: Filter core_symbols to MIS-eligible stocks early in startup. Reduces ~2385 -> ~1500 symbols. Saves WS slots, prewarm time, Stage-0 compute. Uses ZerodhaMISFetcher (Google Sheets CSV). Required for Upstox hybrid mode (2000 instrument limit).

_comment_conviction_gate: === CONVICTION GATE (sub-project #2, retrained on sub7+sub8 OCI 2026-04-28) ===

conviction_gate._comment_retrain: Plan C model trained on all 281,795 sub7+sub8 trades from OCI 20260428-082149. Validation Pearson 0.11 (clipped) / 0.06 (raw). Plan A (Stage 3 cells only, n=7,310) collapsed to no signal â€” kept for reference at 2026-04-28-sub8-A-*.json.

dedup_gate._comment: Replaces ScreenerLive._dedupe_ok. Enforces same-symbol cooloff + setup-change + score-beats-max(pctl,last) rules. Legacy keys dedupe_cooloff_bars / dedupe_require_setup_change in filters config will be removed in T14.

gate_input_logging._comment: When true, screener_live writes per-bar candidate dicts + bar_volumes to gate_input.jsonl. Required for parity_simulator. Disable in production trading.

live_gate_chain._comment: Master switch for the composed gate stack. When false, ScreenerLive instantiates the chain in passthrough mode.

rule_filter_gate._comment_retrain: Plan C admit-all-per-setup survivors (8 tautology rules) â€” RuleFilterGate passes every sub7+sub8 candidate through to ConvictionGate, which is the actual discriminator. For Stage 3 cell enforcement, swap to stage6_validation_survivors_A_stage3_cells.json (14 rules).
